MroTestz
    Regressions for some bugs revealed through
    mcsl.mro() customization (typeobject.c: mro_internal()) and
    cls.__bases__ assignment (typeobject.c: type_set_bases()).
    c
step
readyrx
MroTest.setUpc
limitZ
retr;
step_untilq
MroTest.step_untilc
        type_set_bases must be aware that type->tp_mro can be NULL.
        c
z4MroTest.test_incomplete_set_bases_on_self.<locals>.Mc
z8MroTest.test_incomplete_set_bases_on_self.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z4MroTest.test_incomplete_set_bases_on_self.<locals>.ANr
!test_incomplete_set_bases_on_selfw
z)MroTest.test_incomplete_set_bases_on_selfc
        Deep reentrancy must not over-decref old_mro.
        c
z/MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_base.<locals>.Mc
z3MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_base.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z/MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_base.<locals>.ANr
z/MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_base.<locals>.BNr
test_reent_set_bases_on_base
z$MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_basec
        Similar to test_reent_set_bases_on_base, but may crash differently.
        c
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base.<locals>.Mc
z:MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base.<locals>.ANr
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base.<locals>.BNr
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base.<locals>.CNr
#test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_base
z+MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_on_direct_basec
        type_set_bases must check for an inheritance cycle not only through
        MRO of the type, which may be not yet updated in case of reentrance,
        but also through tp_base chain, which is assigned before diving into
        inner calls to mro().
        Otherwise, the following snippet can loop forever:
            do {
                // ...
                type = type->tp_base;
            } while (type != NULL);
        Functions that rely on tp_base (like solid_base and PyType_IsSubtype)
        would not be happy in that case, causing a stack overflow.
        c
z5MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle.<locals>.Mc
z9MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z5MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle.<locals>.ANr
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle.<locals>.B1Nr
z6MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle.<locals>.B2Nr
"test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cycle
z*MroTest.test_reent_set_bases_tp_base_cyclec
        type_set_bases must check for reentrancy upon finishing its job
        by updating tp_subclasses of old/new bases of the type.
        Otherwise, an implicit inheritance cycle through tp_subclasses
        can break functions that recurse on elements of that field
        (like recurse_down_subclasses and mro_hierarchy) eventually
        leading to a stack overflow.
        c
z;MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.Mc
z?MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z;MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.ANr
z<MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.B1Nr
z<MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.B2Nr
z;MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots.<locals>.CNr
(test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots
z0MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slotsc
        The same as test_tp_subclasses_cycle_in_update_slots, but tests
        a code path executed on error (goto bail).
        c
z=MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.ENr
z=MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.Mc
zAMroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z=MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.ANr

z>MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.B2Nr
z=MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path.<locals>.CNr
*test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_path
z2MroTest.test_tp_subclasses_cycle_error_return_pathc
        Extending an unitialized type with type->tp_mro == NULL must
        throw a reasonable TypeError exception, instead of failing
        with PyErr_BadInternalCall.
        c
z)MroTest.test_incomplete_extend.<locals>.Mc

z-MroTest.test_incomplete_extend.<locals>.M.mroNrU
z)MroTest.test_incomplete_extend.<locals>.ANr
test_incomplete_extend
MroTest.test_incomplete_extendc
        Attribute lookup on a super object must be aware that
        its target type can be uninitialized (type->tp_mro == NULL).
        c
